data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for SMS/app notifications indicating when a customer is approaching their turn in the queue. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of such notifications. The linked use case mentions the SMS notification, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that this feature is implemented and functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of SMS/app notifications being sent when the number is approaching.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
